summary: Iteration 45: Tested new Tournament Payouts feature for managers. All 6 features PASS. Manager role correctly sees 'Tournament Payouts' button, dialog opens with tournament selector, preview stats display correctly, 'No payouts found' message shows for empty tournaments with disabled Generate button, PDF generation works, and referee role correctly sees 'Pay Period Report' instead of 'Tournament Payouts'.

issues: Console warning: 'Of the table content, 41 units width could not fit page' and 'Of the table content, 97 units width could not fit page' - PDF table may have minor overflow issues on some data, but PDF still generates correctly

manager_sees_tournament_payouts_button.detail: Tournament Payouts button visible in Payments page header for manager role

tournament_payouts_dialog_opens.detail: Clicking Tournament Payouts opens dialog with tournament selector dropdown

preview_stats_display.detail: Selecting tournament shows preview stats: Total ($75), Referees (1), Paid ($75), Pending ($0), payout count badge, game count badge

no_payouts_message.detail: Selecting tournament with no payouts (Summer Prep Jam) shows 'No payouts found for this tournament' message and Generate button is disabled

pdf_generation.detail: Generate PDF button downloads branded PDF file (iWhistle_Tournament_Payouts_Spring_Showcase_Classic.pdf) with toast confirmation 'Report generated - Spring Showcase Classic payout report downloaded'

referee_sees_pay_period_report.detail: Referee role sees 'Pay Period Report' button (not Tournament Payouts) - correct role-gating

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Role-based button visibility correctly implemented using user?.role === 'manager' and user?.role === 'referee' checks in Payments.tsx
GOOD: TournamentPayoutDialog correctly filters payments by tournament games and shows appropriate preview stats
GOOD: Generate button correctly disabled when no tournament selected or when tournament has no payouts
MINOR: PDF generation shows console warnings about table width overflow - may want to adjust column widths in exportTournamentPayoutReport.ts for better fit
seed_data_creation: Used existing Firebase data: Spring Showcase Classic tournament with 1 payout ($75), Summer Prep Jam tournament with no payouts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Tournament Payouts features are working correctly. The feature is properly role-gated (manager only). PDF generation works with branded iWhistle layout. Minor console warning about PDF table width overflow but PDF generates correctly. Previous iteration 44 had 1 bug (Contact Support route) - check if that was fixed.
